name: Execution via HTA using IE JavaScript Engine
description: Detects the execution of an HTA (HTML Application) file using the Internet Explorer JavaScript engine, a potential LOLBin abuse.

prompts.prompt: HTA (HTML Application) execution detected using the Internet Explorer JavaScript engine, a potential Living Off The Land Binary (LOLBin) abuse. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Source Image (mshta.exe)** {SourceImage}, **Image (jscript9.dll)** {Image}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}. Investigate this high-risk activity for potential code execution and defense evasion.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Image Load (7).

parameters.name: SourceImage
parameters.description: The image that initiated the load (mshta.exe).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.
